title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Affection for Offspring
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Affection for Offspring.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Affection for Offspring.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Affection for Offspring': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
